pipeline._note1: THE TEST. Sits after the CoM sinks (watchers see the true error) and before the fsp (open-phase recording is the raw error, not a command). During the open phase the fsp is fed zeros, so -- like the kalman in attenuation_test.json -- it parks at 0; settle_time covers its cold-start Kalman convergence + first adaptation tick after the loop closes. pixel_scale 31.5 = (64-1)/2. config is printed verbatim on page 2 of the PDF.
pipeline._note2: compare the closed RMS-about-mean here against attenuation10_lead_fc64 (x 0.244, y 0.151 px). Same nfft/open/closed as that run for a shared grid.

params.config:
ROBUST FULL-BAND FSP (Smith reconstruction + identified Wiener/Kalman predictor), replaces pid+kalman
latest Bode delay=1.81 ms=4.18 frames; delay=4+0.18 Thiran all-pass, fs=2310, broad_order=128, broad_mu=.005
attenuation11 lesson: excellent 0-64 Hz rejection, but linear fractional delay + 512 taps pumped HF; y=.1273 x=.2179 px
128 taps retains nearly all theoretical prediction while reducing HF overfit; lower mu reduces steady-state coefficient noise
accept only after a >=500 s closed hardware run with no command clipping or HF instability
refs: Kulcsar 2006 / Petit 2008 / Meimon 2010 / Correia 2010

pipeline._note: controller under test; params identical to steering_fsp.json except start_delay/ramp are short here because attenuation_test owns the open/closed sequencing. VERIFY the sign of K with a push test before running this closed.
